title: South Korea and Philippines Forge Stronger Economic Ties
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung met with Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr to discuss strengthening economic cooperation. The meeting focused on collaboration in artificial intelligence, green energy, shipbuilding, and cultural sectors, aiming to enhance bilateral relations and economic growth for both nations.
content:

title: Hiring in India Rises 12% in February on AI Push, IT Sector Recovery: Report
description: A report shows hiring in India rose 12% in February as companies expanded artificial intelligence roles and the information technology sector witnessed a steady recovery in recruitment activity.
content:
India's white-collar job market recorded a 12 per cent year-on-year growth in February, amid increasing AI adoptions and a recovery in the IT sector, a report said on Tuesday.
